summary: Story Engine Migration testing complete. All 12 features verified. Backend: 100% pass rate (34/34 tests). Frontend: 100% pass rate. All frontend components (StoryVideoPipeline.js, ProgressiveGeneration.js, Profile.js, Dashboard.js, StoryPreview.js, BrowserVideoExport.js) now use /api/story-engine/* endpoints instead of /api/pipeline/*. Legacy pipeline_jobs are transparently handled via fallback lookups.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/story-engine/options returns animation_styles (6), age_groups (5), voice_presets (5), credit_costs - all working
GET /api/story-engine/rate-limit-status returns can_create, recent_count, max_per_hour, concurrent, max_concurrent for authenticated users
GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs returns merged jobs from BOTH story_engine_jobs and pipeline_jobs collections with 'source' field
GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} works for both new engine jobs and legacy pipeline_jobs (fallback lookup)
GET /api/story-engine/validate-asset/{job_id} returns ui_state (READY/PARTIAL_READY/PROCESSING/FAILED), preview_ready, download_ready, share_ready
GET /api/story-engine/preview/{job_id} returns scene data for both engine and legacy jobs
POST /api/story-engine/create requires authentication (returns 401 without token) and validates title (min 3 chars) and story_text (min 50 chars)
POST /api/story-engine/resume/{job_id} works for both engine and legacy pipeline_jobs
POST /api/story-engine/notify-when-ready/{job_id} requires authentication and returns 404 for invalid jobs
GET /api/story-engine/asset-proxy returns 403 for non-R2 URLs (only r2.cloudflarestorage.com and r2.dev allowed)
Frontend Dashboard.js uses /api/story-engine/user-jobs for resume story banner
Frontend BrowserVideoExport.js uses /api/story-engine/asset-proxy for CORS bypass
seed_data_creation: None - used existing jobs from both story_engine_jobs and pipeline_jobs collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Engine Migration testing complete. All /api/story-engine/* endpoints verified: (1) /options returns animation_styles, age_groups, voice_presets. (2) /rate-limit-status returns can_create for authenticated users. (3) /user-jobs returns merged jobs from BOTH collections with 'source' field (story_engine or legacy_pipeline). (4) /status/{job_id} falls back to pipeline_jobs if not in story_engine_jobs. (5) /validate-asset/{job_id} returns ui_state for frontend. (6) /preview/{job_id} returns scene data. (7) /create requires auth and validates input. (8) /resume/{job_id} works for both collections. (9) /notify-when-ready/{job_id} requires auth. (10) /asset-proxy rejects non-R2 URLs. Frontend components all use new endpoints.

Feature_1_Options_Endpoint.details: GET /api/story-engine/options returns animation_styles (6), age_groups (5), voice_presets (5), credit_costs

Feature_2_Rate_Limit_Status.details: GET /api/story-engine/rate-limit-status returns can_create, recent_count, max_per_hour, concurrent, max_concurrent

Feature_3_User_Jobs_Merged.details: GET /api/story-engine/user-jobs returns 50 jobs merged from story_engine_jobs and pipeline_jobs with 'source' field

Feature_4_Status_Legacy_Fallback.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} works for legacy pipeline_jobs via fallback lookup

Feature_6_Preview_Legacy.details: GET /api/story-engine/preview/{job_id} returns scene data for legacy pipeline_jobs

Feature_7_Create_Auth_Required.details: POST /api/story-engine/create returns 401 without token, validates title (min 3) and story_text (min 50)

Feature_9_Notify_When_Ready.details: POST /api/story-engine/notify-when-ready/{job_id} requires auth, returns 404 for invalid jobs

Feature_11_Frontend_Studio_Page.details: Story Video Studio page loads with options from /api/story-engine/options, recent videos from /api/story-engine/user-jobs

Feature_12_Frontend_Preview_Page.details: Story Preview page loads with scene viewer, Export MP4 button uses /api/story-engine/asset-proxy

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocking.
